report.indication: Right breast palpable lump at 10 o'clock.
report.technique: Diagnostic mammography with spot compression of the right breast.
report.comparison: Screening mammogram from prior year, no prior abnormality at this site.
report.findings: Right breast: spiculated mass at the 10 o'clock position, 5 cm from the nipple. Bilateral remaining breast tissue is heterogeneously dense.
report.impression:
1. 12 mm spiculated right breast mass, suspicious for malignancy.
2. BI-RADS 4B.
